---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused addition to the agent eval toolchain
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What real workflow gap does this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful feature that would address it.

## Where it fits

- [ ] AgentCI
- [ ] TracePack
- [ ] FailMap
- [ ] PackSlice
- [ ] Cross-tool handoff
- [ ] Docs / examples / CI

## Artifact contract

What file, output, or CLI shape would this add or change?

## Why this belongs in AgentEvalKit

Explain why this strengthens the eval / regression / failure-analysis story rather than adding a generic demo.
